title: Slot Vocabulary
description: Per-locale slot vocabulary. Defines every {slot} identifier the system uses, with type, value set, and TTS expansion strategy. Consumed by the TTS Canonicalizer (offline) and the runtime SlotResolver (online).

aliases.description: Optional. Maps legacy slot names (used in narration JSONs) to canonical slot identifiers in this vocabulary.

vocabularies.description: Map of canonical slot identifier (e.g., 'round.creatureSpecies') to vocabulary entry.

type.description: Data type of the slot's resolved value.

description.description: Designer-readable explanation of when this slot applies.

oneOf.description: Enumerated value list for enum/string slots.
For derived slots: a map from source value to this slot's value.

range.description: For numeric slots: the bounds of expected values. Used for digit-stitched audio generation.

derivedFrom.description: Another slot identifier this one's value derives from (e.g., plural from singular).

spokenAs.description: How the value is rendered in audio. 'literal' = the value as-is; 'numeral-as-word' = 5 -> 'five'; 'ordinal-as-word' = 3 -> 'third'; 'time-of-day' = locale time formatting.

valueSet.description: How values are obtained. 'enumerated' = listed in `values`; 'user-supplied' = entered by kid; 'system-derived' = computed at runtime.

ttsExpansionStrategy.description: How the TTS Canonicalizer handles this slot when rendering audio.
